allow: PowerShell($log = "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\HP\\cf_tunnel.log"; if\(Test-Path $log\){Remove-Item $log -Force}; Start-Process -FilePath "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Temp\\cloudflared.exe" -ArgumentList 'tunnel','--url','http://localhost:80' -RedirectStandardError $log -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Output "started, waiting for URL...")

PowerShell($log = "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\HP\\cf_tunnel.log"; $u=$null; for\($i=0;$i -lt 20;$i++\){ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500; if\(Test-Path $log\){ $m = Select-String -Path $log -Pattern 'https://[a-z0-9-]+\\.trycloudflare\\.com' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if\($m\){ $u=$m.Matches[0].Value; break } } }; if\($u\){ Write-Output "NEW URL: $u" } else { Write-Output "URL not found yet. Last log lines:"; Get-Content $log -Tail 20 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== gh CLI ==="; $gh=Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($gh\){ $gh.Source; gh auth status 2>&1 | Out-String } else { "gh NOT installed" }; Write-Output "=== git remote ==="; git -C "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\HP" remote -v; Write-Output "=== git status ==="; git -C "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\HP" status -s; Write-Output "=== branch ==="; git -C "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\HP" branch --show-current)

PowerShell($base="https://sioharu0331.github.io/HP"; foreach\($u in @\("$base/woterimage_LP/index.html","$base/index.html"\)\){ try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output \("{0}  -> HTTP {1} \({2} bytes\)" -f $u,$r.StatusCode,$r.Content.Length\) }catch{ Write-Output \("{0}  -> {1}" -f $u, $_.Exception.Message\) } })

PowerShell($base="https://sioharu0331.github.io/HP/woterimage_LP"; $assets="index.html","mo01.mp4","mo07.webm","poster.jpg","water_drop01.mp3"; foreach\($a in $assets\){ try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "$base/$a" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20 -Method Head; Write-Output \("{0,-14} HTTP {1}" -f $a,$r.StatusCode\) }catch{ Write-Output \("{0,-14} {1}" -f $a,$_.Exception.Message\) } })

PowerShell($d="$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\HP\\woterimage_LP"; "=== target videos ==="; "mo05.mp4","mo06.mp4","mo08.mp4" | ForEach-Object { $p=Join-Path $d $_; if\(Test-Path $p\){ "{0,8:N1} MB  {1}" -f \(\(Get-Item $p\).Length/1MB\), $_ } else { "MISSING: $_" } }; "=== webm versions? ==="; "mo05.webm","mo06.webm","mo08.webm" | ForEach-Object { $p=Join-Path $d $_; if\(Test-Path $p\){"exists: $_"}else{"none: $_"} }; "=== ffmpeg? ==="; \(Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($ff="C:\\Users\\F-006USER\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages\\Gyan.FFmpeg_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\\ffmpeg-8.1.1-full_build\\bin\\ffmpeg.exe"; $d="$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\HP\\woterimage_LP"; $map=@{"mo05.mp4"="poster05.jpg";"mo06.mp4"="poster06.jpg";"mo08.mp4"="poster08.jpg"}; foreach\($k in $map.Keys\){ $src=Join-Path $d $k; $out=Join-Path $d $map[$k]; & $ff -y -loglevel error -ss 1 -i $src -frames:v 1 -q:v 4 $out; if\(Test-Path $out\){ "{0} -> {1} \({2:N0} KB\)" -f $k,$map[$k],\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length/1KB\) } else { "FAILED: $k" } })

PowerShell($edge = @\("C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe","C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"\) | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; $chrome = @\("C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"\) | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; "EDGE=$edge"; "CHROME=$chrome")
